subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath sent down the verses in truth and made them a proof unto all who dwell in the kingdom, and verily they are the Cord of God amongst [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی نزل الایات بالحق و جعلها حجه لمن فی الملک جمیعا و انها لحبل الله بین
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @personal instructions, @call to action, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
